about.heading: Hussein Najdi
about.bio: Full-stack developer based in Beirut, building web platforms and business systems end-to-end — from database architecture to polished interfaces. I work with companies and founders who need software that's built to last, not just to launch.

contact.terminalLine2: Ready to build something worth keeping.
